feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Jason Todd/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: There’s got to be someone normal…
entry.summary:
Author: Alryxxz

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,299Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: You cant understand it. The whole concept of Gotham as a whole, and its protector—Batman. Sure you respect the guy for not killing off every petty little criminal, but there is no shot that EVERYBODY deserves to live. There has got to be a vigilante who thinks this moral code is idiotic, and that Batman is being a fool while enforcing it, right? Or You find out there’s a vigilante named red-hood who’s against the ‘no kill rule’, and you two bond over it without knowing he’s one.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The City of Black and White Turned Red
entry.summary:
Author: blessingsblessing

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,665Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 6

Summary: This is a story that follows a military brat turned detective in one of the most dangerous, disfunctional cities in the world. One day she is met with a new case, a drug bust gone wrong. There's more than meets the eye. A dangerous anti-hero? New high tech drugs? Drug wars? Her normal crazy was going to get a lot crazier as she finds herself right in the middle of the most dangerous, world changing case in the city.

entry.title: Have you found it yet?
entry.summary:
Author: lixsznshine

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,304Chapters: 3/27Kudos: 17

Summary: There were many reasons to be sad in Gotham. First of all, because you have the misfortune of living in Gotham. In close second, the endless threat of whatever supercriminal that had decided today was the day the world ends. Third, it stinks. There were many reasons to hate your life if you lived in Gotham. You could breathe the wrong way and get stabbed, or god forbid you decide to carry some cash on you - you’d practically be walking into your own grave at that point. It seems you’ve failed at everything that you’ve tried in your life, including finding a reason to explain your never-ending sadness.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

  • guys the first chapter is really depressing but i promise its all cool and joyous

  • Bruce Wayne Tries to Be a Good Parent

entry.title: Unlocked
entry.summary:
Author: Pinkhair_angel

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,094Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 5

Summary: In Gotham, leaving a door unlocked should be considered a mistake. For you, it became a ritual — one you waited for with equal parts fear and longing. Every Thursday, Jason Todd finds his way back to your apartment after patrol: bruised, exhausted, and carrying more wounds than he’s willing to admit. You both know how to survive. How to brace yourselves for the pain before it comes. How to live with loss. But after spending so long preparing yourselves to lose everything… Do either of you really know what it means to stay?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.summary:
Author: velvet_alchemist

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,796Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 45

Summary: I’m sorry the name is lowkey questionable but I wanted to make sure yall know what this is. Warning: probably cringe but my reader asked for it and I am a dutiful writer for my loyal royal subjects. entry.title: The Witch in the Woods
entry.summary:
Author: Kandyscorner

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,788Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 123

Summary: Request from tumblr:Hello!This my first time rq anything relate to dc i'm still new in the fandom yet so DESPERATE in love with jason toddso can i rq him with witch reader(a sweet witch like the one in the fairy tales who lives in a secluded hut in the woods or perhaps with a lake surrounded by nature. and animals) in cute scenario...Jason is on a mission with the outlaws and somehow finds himself in the middle of a forest and there he finds a hut without knowing that it belongs to a witch Or maybe he is injured and loses consciousness and then later finds himself taken care of by an unknown woman.....or something like that, i know i yap so much i can't help

entry.summary:
Author: loserinadress

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,080Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

entry.title: COLOR ME, YOU
entry.summary:
Author: reveriery

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,372Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 81

Summary: "Can you cosplay as Red Hood for me, pretty please?"How does a minor crush on the hot guy at the library lead you to ask Jason Todd to be your muse. A story about how hope when given, returns to you when you least expect it. cross posted on tumblr @luviery

entry.title: Lighters in the Darkness
entry.summary:
Author: haunted_me

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,029Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 8

Summary: What happens when you find something you’re not supposed to? What happens when saving the cities young savior changes your life forever? How do you fix what’s broken? How do you grow alongside the damaged and forgotten? or You save the forgotten Robin and stand by him as he grows to take over the city that failed him one too many times.

entry.title: Burning House
entry.summary:
Author: Yes_I_have_daddy_issues

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,192Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 76

Summary: We were kids together, growing up in the same crime ridden alleyways and neighborhoods, just two doors down the road from each other. “I’ll find a way.” he turned back to face me, a big smile stretching across his face, one I would never forget, the light in his eyes visible. I never saw Jason again after that night. Not in person at least. On the news, getting adopted by Bruce Wayne of all people, waving and smiling to the cameras, it never reached his eyes the way his smile always did when we were younger. Then he vanished for good.

entry.title: The Way You See Me
entry.summary:
Author: Xivkyn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,524Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 111

Summary: After being an experiment to Hugo Strange for the majority of your life you finally escape. The trauma of your time there follows you as you remember the screams and death all around you. You don't even know your own name as the number 'Seven' was the only semblance of a name you were given. You have no one to go home to and nothing you look forward to except for revenge. It consumes your every thought ever since you escaped. You want him to feel the pain he caused you and your friends.Limited y/n usage

entry.title: A Different Life With You
entry.summary:
Author: veena_the_aloo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,479Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 140

Summary: Jason doesn't wanna die. He really doesn't. He prays to whatever god that will listen to not let him die again.Whatever god did seem to be listening seemed to have given pity. Because when he wakes, he wakes up ten years older, in a house he doesn't recognize, married to a woman he doesn't know and with kids he's never seen. He's in another man's body. (Can be read as Reader or OC since FMC is never directly referred to by name or described)
